artikler.titel: Music streamer Deezer says more than 50% of daily uploads are AI-generated
artikler.resume: Deezer said more than 90,000 AI-generated tracks were uploaded daily on the platform in June

artikler.titel: Halliday’s latest smart glasses feature a much-improved display
artikler.resume: I first slipped on Halliday's original smart glasses at CES 2025. I was not a fan. The glasses had a tiny, movable display window embedded into the frame that was incredibly finicky to see, and my 30-minute demo left me with achy eyeballs. It was an interesting concept with terrible execution, especially compared to the […]

artikler.titel: America needs to stop getting shocked by Chinese AI
artikler.resume: Last week, two Chinese AI companies unveiled models they say can credibly compete with the best systems from OpenAI and Anthropic. The response was swift and predictable. Markets wobbled, commentators declared Silicon Valley shooketh, and policymakers reached for the familiar language of arms races and wake-up calls. In one headline, The Associated Press said a […]
artikler.rubrik: Kina overrasker igen med stærk kunstig intelligens
artikler.resume_da: To kinesiske firmaer har vist AI-modeller, der kan måle sig med de bedste amerikanske. Eksperter mener, USA bør vænne sig til konkurrencen i stedet for at blive forskrækket.

artikler.titel: Advancing next-gen AI with materials science innovation
artikler.resume: The conversation about AI often centers on algorithms, computing power, or huge investments in new semiconductor fabrication plants and hyperscale data centers. But beneath each of these advances is another layer of innovation that makes them possible: advanced materials. Every new generation of AI technology demands more processing power, more memory, greater energy efficiency, and…
artikler.rubrik: Nye materialer skal drive fremtidens AI
artikler.resume_da: Bag alle AI-fremskridt gemmer sig noget lavpraktisk: materialerne i computerchips. Forskere arbejder på nye materialer, der kan gøre AI hurtigere og billigere.

artikler.titel: Gritt exits stealth with $32 million for robots to build solar plants — then, everything else
artikler.resume: Gritt is coming out of stealth with $34 million and plans to automate the hardest tasks on construction sites.
artikler.rubrik: Robotter skal bygge solcelleparker for millioner
artikler.resume_da: Firmaet Gritt har fået 230 millioner kroner til robotter, der tager det hårdeste slid på byggepladser – først solcelleanlæg, siden alt muligt andet.

artikler.titel: Rater State Bias in RLHF Preference Data: An Audit Framework
artikler.resume: We identify a structured confound in Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF). Pairwise preference labels are intended to reflect the compared outputs, but they may also reflect the rater's state during annotation. Under sustained stressful or distressing conditions, raters' preferences may shift over time. As a result, preference data can encode rater state alongside judgments about…
artikler.rubrik: Trætte testere kan gøre AI dårligere
artikler.resume_da: AI lærer af menneskers vurderinger – men ny forskning viser, at vurderingerne farves af, om folk er trætte eller stressede. Det kan give skæve resultater.

artikler.titel: Design and Validation of a Lightweight 1D CNN for Affective Touch Classification in Soft Plush Companions
artikler.resume: Soft, sensorized companions offer a physically safe and emotionally intuitive interface for socially assistive technologies, yet their deformability and multichannel tactile sensing complicate the robust interpretation of human affect. This study presents a complete open-source MATLAB-based framework for the development and validation of compact deep learning models for affective touch…
artikler.rubrik: Krammebamse med AI forstår din berøring
artikler.resume_da: Forskere har lært en blød robotbamse at mærke forskel på kærtegn, klap og knus. Den slags kan blive en hjælp for ensomme og ældre.

artikler.titel: Some Large Language Models Exhibit Consistent Risk Attitudes
artikler.resume: As artificial intelligence systems are deployed in open-ended, high-stakes settings, a critical dimension remains unmeasured: how perceived risk is translated into action. We test whether large language models (LLMs) exhibit systematic and consistent risk attitudes under uncertainty. We introduce a cross-domain framework that decouples contextual risk belief from categorical decision, and apply…
artikler.rubrik: AI-modeller har deres egen risikovillighed
artikler.resume_da: Nogle AI-modeller spiller konsekvent sikkert, andre tager chancer. Forskere har nu målt det – vigtigt at vide, før vi lader AI træffe store beslutninger.

artikler.titel: A Survey on GNN-based Link Prediction: Techniques, Applications, and Challenges
artikler.resume: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have emerged as the leading paradigm for link prediction, enabling the inference of missing connections and the anticipation of potential future links. However, existing reviews lack systematic exploration specifically targeting underlying GNN architectures and diverse graph structures. To address this critical gap, this paper provides a comprehensive review of…
artikler.rubrik: Sådan gætter AI dine næste venner
artikler.resume_da: Stort forskningsoverblik over teknikken bag 'folk du måske kender'. AI forudsiger forbindelser i netværk – fra venskaber til nye lægemidler.

artikler.titel: PlanFlip: Attacking Multi-Agent LLM Systems via Planning-Phase Prompt Injection
artikler.resume: Multi-agent LLM systems increasingly rely on a Planner to decompose goals into sub-task sequences that downstream Executor and Critic agents execute and audit. We identify the planning phase as a critical attack surface: a single injection into the Planner's context achieves cascade amplification, corrupting all downstream sub-tasks simultaneously. We introduce PlanFlip, a framework comprising…
artikler.rubrik: Hackere kan narre AI-hold under planlægningen
artikler.resume_da: Når flere AI'er samarbejder, lægger én planen. Forskere viser, at netop planlæggeren kan manipuleres – og så følger resten trop uden at opdage det.

artikler.titel: Deterministic Replay for AI Agent Systems
artikler.resume: AI agent systems that couple large language models (LLMs) with external tools and APIs are inherently non-deterministic: LLM sampling variance, external API state, CDN infrastructure headers, and execution-environment noise collectively prevent any prior agent run from being faithfully re-executed. Existing observability platforms capture execution logs but cannot reproduce a run in isolation. We…
artikler.rubrik: Forskere vil kunne spole AI-fejl tilbage
artikler.resume_da: AI-systemer opfører sig aldrig helt ens to gange. Ny teknik optager alt, så fejl kan afspilles igen – som en sort boks i et fly.

artikler.titel: Generative Ontology Induction: Domain-Agnostic Schema Discovery from Document Corpora Using Large Language Models
artikler.resume: Ontology engineering remains a critical bottleneck in knowledge-intensive AI systems. Existing automated approaches either depend on predefined schemas, operate within narrow domains, or produce unstructured outputs unsuitable for downstream pipelines. We introduce Generative Ontology Induction (GOI), a domain-agnostic framework that induces a generative blueprint - entities, dimensions,…
artikler.rubrik: AI rydder selv op i rodede dokumentbunker
artikler.resume_da: Ny metode lader AI selv finde system og struktur i store bunker dokumenter – uden at mennesker først skal bygge skemaer.

artikler.titel: Democratizing AI with Small Language Models: Structured Benchmarking and Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning for Local Deployment
artikler.resume: AI democratization is not primarily a question of matching frontier-scale generality; it is a question of whether capable models can be selected, audited, and specialized under hardware and governance constraints that ordinary institutions can actually satisfy. This paper studies that problem through a controlled evaluation of nine open-weight language models between 135M and 3B parameters on a…
artikler.rubrik: Små AI-modeller kan køre hjemme hos dig
artikler.resume_da: AI behøver ikke gigantiske datacentre. Forskere viser, hvordan små modeller kan tilpasses og køre lokalt – billigere, mere privat og for alle.

artikler.titel: Masked Diffusion Language Models are Strong and Steerable Text-Based World Models for Agentic RL
artikler.resume: Recent growth in reinforcement learning (RL) has surfaced a need for diverse, specialized training environments. Hand-curated environments with fixed task and reward difficulties become ineffective signals as model performance improves, and sparse rewards over long horizons induce mode collapse on specific workflows or tool structures. World models that simulate environment states have matched…
artikler.rubrik: AI træner AI i kunstige tekstverdener
artikler.resume_da: Forskere bruger én slags AI til at bygge øvebaner, hvor en anden AI kan træne. Det kan gøre træningen både hurtigere og bedre.

artikler.titel: It Takes 8 Tokens: Weak-to-Strong Off-Policy RL via Auxiliary Branches
artikler.resume: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has emerged as a standard approach for enhancing reasoning in large language models, which typically optimizes the policy by contrasting multiple self generated rollouts. However, we identify a critical support limited bottleneck in this paradigm: on challenging reasoning tasks, the target model's samples often exhibit semantic redundancy, converging…
artikler.rubrik: Otte små ord gør AI markant klogere
artikler.resume_da: Ny træningsmetode viser, at ganske få hjælpeord fra en svagere model kan løfte en stærk models evne til at tænke sig om.

artikler.titel: PPO-HSC: An Exploratory Reinforcement Learning Framework Based on Wide-Area Policy Coverage Optimization
artikler.resume: This paper introduces PPO-HSC (Proximal Policy Optimization with High-order Sampling Coverage), an exploratory reinforcement learning framework designed to address the "Invisible Shackles" of mode collapse in Large Language Model (LLM) fine-tuning. While standard Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) effectively reinforces high-reward trajectories, it often leads models to…
artikler.rubrik: Ny metode giver AI mere nysgerrighed
artikler.resume_da: AI-træning kører ofte fast i vanetænkning. En ny teknik skubber modellen til at udforske bredere – og finde bedre løsninger.

artikler.titel: JUMP: Single-Pass Membership Inference on Fine-Tuned Diffusion Language Models
artikler.resume: Membership inference attacks (MIAs) test whether a candidate example appeared in a model's training data. We study MIAs for fine-tuned discrete diffusion language models (dLLMs), where membership means inclusion in the target model's fine-tuning set. Unlike autoregressive language models, dLLMs allow an attacker to choose arbitrary mask sets and obtain token distributions for all masked positions…
artikler.rubrik: Var dine data med i AI-træningen?
artikler.resume_da: Forskere har fundet en hurtig måde at afsløre, om en bestemt tekst blev brugt til at træne en AI. Vigtigt for privatliv og ophavsret.

artikler.titel: ColGraphRAG: Late-Interaction Evidence Retrieval for Multimodal GraphRAG
artikler.resume: Graph-grounded multimodal question answering organizes text, tables, and images in a structured evidence graph, yet end-to-end accuracy depends on which multimodal assets are ranked highly enough to enter downstream reasoning; for graph-linked images, single-vector bi-encoder similarity can discard patch- and token-level structure needed for fine-grained alignment. We evaluate replacing the…
artikler.rubrik: AI finder svar i tekst, tabeller og billeder
artikler.resume_da: Ny metode hjælper AI med at udvælge de rigtige beviser, når svaret gemmer sig på tværs af dokumenter, skemaer og fotos.

artikler.titel: Shapley Context Pruning: A Cooperative Game Perspective for Context Reranking and Pruning
artikler.resume: Context reranking and pruning have become essential for improving the efficiency of modern Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems, yet an interpretable and unified framework remains underexplored. Previous work has primarily emphasized lexical retrieval, cross-encoder architectures, model distillation, and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), mostly relying on heuristic loss functions and empirical…
artikler.rubrik: AI lærer at smide støj væk
artikler.resume_da: Når AI søger i mange dokumenter, drukner den let i fyld. Ny metode beregner, hvilke tekststykker der faktisk hjælper på svaret.

artikler.titel: A Survey on the Verification of Reinforcement Learning Policies
artikler.resume: Reinforcement learning (RL) is increasingly applied in complex, safety-critical domains, yet the lack of rigorous behavioral guarantees for neural network-based policies remains a major barrier to deployment. Recent advances in policy expressiveness and scale have intensified this challenge, leading to a rapidly growing but conceptually fragmented body of work on RL policy verification. This…
artikler.rubrik: Kan vi stole på selvlærende maskiner?
artikler.resume_da: Overblik over metoder til at bevise, at selvlærende AI opfører sig sikkert – afgørende før den styrer fabrikker, biler og strømnet.

artikler.titel: Accurate and Efficient Long-Term Memory for LLM Agents
artikler.resume: LLM agents augmented with persistent memory can recall past interactions, but existing systems suffer from two limitations: flat, unstructured storage loses relational context needed for multi-hop and temporal reasoning, and reliance on expensive LLM-based classification makes them impractical for latency-sensitive deployment. Without mechanisms to validate new information against stored…
artikler.rubrik: AI-assistenter får bedre langtidshukommelse
artikler.resume_da: Ny hukommelsesteknik lader AI-assistenter huske gamle samtaler både præcist og hurtigt – uden at blande tingene sammen.

artikler.titel: Symbolic Augmentation Closes a Canonical-Equivalence Blind Spot in Neural Fact-Checkers
artikler.resume: Large language models hallucinate numbers and units when summarizing scientific text, a failure mode that can silently invert a scientific claim. We recast the detection of such errors as typed verification: we introduce a five-class typed-quantity error taxonomy and a 1500-item benchmark, rewritten from PMC and arXiv sources and labeled by two independent LLM annotators with adjudication…
artikler.rubrik: AI-faktatjek fanger nu flere talfejl
artikler.resume_da: AI-resuméer bytter nogle gange om på tal og enheder, så budskabet vendes på hovedet. Ny metode fanger fejlene automatisk.

artikler.titel: SelKV: Selective KV Cache Merging with Per-Token Merge-or-Drop and Attention Compensation
artikler.resume: Large Language Models (LLMs) generate text autoregressively, relying on a key-value (KV) cache whose memory footprint grows linearly with context length, creating a major bottleneck. Recent compression methods mitigate this cost via token merging; however, these approaches often rely on indiscriminate aggregation, which degrades representations and introduces attention sag, a mismatch where…
artikler.rubrik: Smart hukommelse gør AI billigere at køre
artikler.resume_da: Lange samtaler æder computerkraft. Ny teknik komprimerer AI'ens arbejdshukommelse, uden at svarene bliver dårligere.

artikler.titel: RAIL Guard: Closing the Evaluation-to-Remediation Gap in Responsible AI for LLM Agents
artikler.resume: Existing guardrail systems for large language model agents operate as binary classifiers that block unsafe content, leaving organizations to discard failing outputs and retry from scratch. We introduce RAIL Guard, a closed-loop responsible AI pipeline that evaluates LLM outputs across eight measurable dimensions and iteratively remediates failing outputs through an evaluate-rewrite-reevaluate…
artikler.rubrik: Sikkerhedsvagt retter AI-svar frem for blokering
artikler.resume_da: I dag afviser sikkerhedsfiltre bare dårlige AI-svar. Nyt system reparerer dem i stedet, så arbejdet ikke skal starte forfra.

artikler.titel: Generalist AI Control: Towards Multi-purpose Adaptive Algorithms
artikler.resume: Traditional controllers are designed for specific systems and do not transfer across different system orders and dynamics. We present a Generalist Controller, a learning-based controller capable of controlling systems of varying orders and dynamics. The approach introduces a novel dynamic state-space representation using attention mechanisms with masking, enabling a single neural network, trained…
artikler.rubrik: Én AI-styring til alle slags maskiner
artikler.resume_da: Normalt skal hver maskine have sit eget styresystem. Forskere viser én lærende styring, der kan tilpasse sig vidt forskellige systemer.

artikler.titel: LaCache: Exact Caching and Precision-Adaptive Inference for Diffusion Large Language Models
artikler.resume: Diffusion-based Large Language Models(DLLMs) enable parallel generation via Semi-Autoregressive (SAR) decoding in text generation. However, current methods suffer from severe operator-level redundancy: they recompute the entire sequence during denoising steps, ignoring that the prefix and masked suffix remain invariant within a block. We propose LaCache, a training-free acceleration framework…
artikler.rubrik: Genbrug gør ny AI-type dobbelt hurtig
artikler.resume_da: En ny generation af sprogmodeller regner det samme ud igen og igen. Smart genbrug af mellemregninger gør dem markant hurtigere.

artikler.titel: Interactive Task Alignment as a POMDP
artikler.resume: Current benchmarks for language models primarily evaluate execution on fully specified tasks. However, real user tasks are often ambiguous. Users arrive with incomplete, exploratory, or even inconsistent goals, requiring the assistant to first determine the intended task before carrying it out. We study this problem as task alignment: the ability to align with a user on their intended task. We…
artikler.rubrik: AI skal lære at spørge ind først
artikler.resume_da: Vi ved tit ikke selv præcis, hvad vi vil have. Ny forskning træner AI i at stille opklarende spørgsmål, før den går i gang.

artikler.titel: When to Plan: Learning to Select Between Reactive Control and Deliberative Planning
artikler.resume: It has long been recognized that humans have the ability to switch between fast, reactive decision-making and slower, deliberative planning. In this paper, we study the question of how to learn this ability, known as meta-reasoning, in artificial agents. We model reactive decision-making as a policy that directly maps state observations to actions. Such policies can be trained with reinforcement…
artikler.rubrik: AI lærer hvornår den skal tænke længe
artikler.resume_da: Mennesker skifter mellem hurtige indskydelser og grundige overvejelser. Ny metode lærer AI det samme – tænk kun længe, når det betaler sig.

artikler.titel: Berkeley and Heiserman as an Unexhausted Architecture for Embodied Machine Intelligence
artikler.resume: Edmund C. Berkeley is usually remembered as a writer who helped connect symbolic logic to computing machinery. That description is correct, but incomplete. Read across Berkeley's machine-oriented writings and projects, the central concern is broader: to show that symbolic logic can serve as a practical design language for machines that acquire information, retain it, respond appropriately to…
artikler.rubrik: Gamle robotbøger gemmer på friske idéer
artikler.resume_da: To næsten glemte pionerer fra computerens barndom byggede små tænkende maskiner. Deres tilgang kan stadig inspirere nutidens robotforskere.

artikler.titel: SEER: Supervised Learning to Control Energetic Reasoning
artikler.resume: One of the main strengths of Constraint Programming is the ability to reduce the search space via propagation. However, propagation is a double-edged sword, with more pruning power coming at the price of larger computation time. For each problem constraint, the best propagator depends on the specific instance and may change at search time. In the literature, Machine Learning (ML) techniques and…
artikler.rubrik: AI hjælper computere med at planlægge klogere
artikler.resume_da: Ny metode lærer planlægningsprogrammer, hvornår tunge beregninger er umagen værd. Det sparer tid i alt fra fabrikker til vagtplaner.

artikler.titel: Five US tech giants' hidden debts soar to $1.65T on opaque AI funding
artikler.resume: https://archive.ph/20260720174223/https://asia.nikkei.com/bu... Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48987863 Points: 315 # Comments: 218

artikler.resume_da: Fem amerikanske techgiganter har gæld for over 10.000 milliarder kroner uden om regnskaberne – meget af det til AI-satsninger. Eksperter er bekymrede.

artikler.titel: Anthropic’s landmark $1.5B copyright settlement is approved
artikler.resume: The final approval settles one case, but it doesn't resolve the broader issue of using copyrighted works to train AI models.
artikler.rubrik: AI-firma betaler milliardforlig om ophavsret
artikler.resume_da: Anthropic har fået godkendt et forlig på knap 10 milliarder kroner til forfattere, hvis bøger blev brugt til AI-træning. Striden om ophavsret fortsætter.

artikler.resume: Article URL: https://fortune.com/2026/07/14/voters-ai-backlash-politicians-lose-seats/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48986003 Points: 56 # Comments: 35

artikler.titel: Trump’s latest AI czar has already resigned
artikler.resume: The director role for the Center for AI Standards and Innovation (CAISI) has become a revolving door since David Sacks left his position as czar.

artikler.resume: Sony Music Entertainment has filed another lawsuit against Udio, accusing the AI music generator of infringing the copyright of more than 30,000 of its songs, ranging from Elvis Presley's Hound Dog to Beyoncé's Say My Name, and Harry Styles' As It Was. The lawsuit, filed in a New York court on Monday, claims that this […]

artikler.titel: Firefighting drones in the works as wildfires plague US nearly year-round
artikler.resume: California and XPRIZE competition tests whether drones can stop wildfires early.

artikler.titel: Google is working on a new AI chip designed to make Gemini more efficient
artikler.resume: Alphabet, Google's parent company, is reportedly working on a new chip designed to make its Gemini models run much more efficiently.

artikler.titel: SpaceX in your index fund, explained

So what happens when a company like SpaceX - a giant gamble, and, in my opinion, terribly overpriced - is fast-tracked into the Nasdaq-100? Does […]

artikler.titel: AI’s most important protocol is getting a little bit easier to use
artikler.resume: Under the new system, the protocol will take a looser, "stateless" approach to session IDs on the server side, similar to how most ordinary websites already work.

artikler.titel: X relaunches a rebuilt Android app after year-long effort
artikler.resume: X says the rebuilt version of its Android app is now available globally.

artikler.titel: OpenAI is scared of open-weight models. Should the US be?
artikler.resume: Talk of banning Chinese-made open-weight LLMs reveals the challenge of turning AI into a business.

artikler.titel: China’s AI models have Trump’s AI world at war with itself

artikler.resume: Article URL: https://unslop.run/blog/measuring-ai-writing-on-arxiv Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48981206 Points: 232 # Comments: 157

artikler.resume: Hi HN, I’m Alex Southmayd, the founder of Bloomy ( https://bloomylearning.com ) – an AI-powered mastery-learning platform for K-12 students. Bloomy provides students with an AI tutor alongside adaptive curriculum (right now Math, English Language Arts, and Writing). How it works: we diagnose students’ skill gaps, place them on personalized learning paths, and give them standards-aligned lessons…

artikler.resume: Adobe's experimental camera app has taken an unexpected turn. After Project Indigo was launched last year to provide a "more natural (SLR-like) look" for iPhone photography, the Indigo camera app is now being updated with a suite of generative AI tools. And the change doesn't rely upon Adobe's own Firefly AI models. Adobe describes the […]

artikler.resume: Augment Code's Vinay Perneti talks models, harnesses, and context.

The rapid-fire releases suggest America's lead at the AI frontier is increasingly tight, just as the technology is becoming […]

artikler.titel: Safety and alignment in an era of long-horizon models
artikler.resume: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-running AI models, highlighting new safety risks, observed failures, and improved safeguards through iterative deployment.

artikler.titel: AI is more likely than humans to form biases when hiring
artikler.resume: The next time you apply for a job, AI may screen your résumé before any human sees it. But there’s good reason to question whether AI will judge you fairly. Researchers already know that LLMs pick up human biases from their training data. New research suggests that LLMs can also develop their own biases from…

artikler.resume: On the latest episode of Equity, we debate whether Apple's lawsuit will cast a shadow over OpenAi's much-discussed plans to get into hardware and go public.
